subject: fix(vercel): move vercel.json to apps/web where Vercel Root Directory points
body:
The root vercel.json was completely ignored because Vercel's Root Directory
is set to apps/web in the dashboard. Moved config to apps/web/vercel.json
with paths relative to apps/web (outputDirectory: "build" instead of
"apps/web/build"). Removed buildCommand/installCommand since Vercel
auto-detects pnpm and uses package.json scripts.

Tags: vercel, deploy, config, monorepo
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-deployment
Semver: patch

title: move vercel.json to apps/web where Vercel Root Directory points
